hook.name: Rivers LaunchHook
hook.description: Singleton Uniswap v4 hook for Rivers protocol launch pools, managing a pre/post-graduation lifecycle. During pre-launch phases, liquidity and swaps are restricted to the pool controller. After graduation, public swaps are enabled with protocol and creator fees taken as BeforeSwapDelta/AfterSwapDelta values and a dynamic LP fee override returned from beforeSwap.
